surface_style.description: Grid Borders (The Technical Look). Replace soft shadows with 1px solid strokes or 2px 'Inner Glow' highlights.
surface_style.classes: border border-white/10 bg-[#141414] rounded-lg md:rounded-xl overflow-hidden

components.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow. On hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1), border color darkens or brightens (e.g. border-blue-500/50).
components.buttons: High-saturation accent blocks. Tactical minimalism. Use Primary color sparingly for major CTAs only. Must have hover states (lighter hue) and focus rings.
components.tables: Use Shadcn Table. Dense, high-contrast rows. Headers should be uppercase, tracking-[0.2em], text-xs.
components.charts: Recharts. Dark mode compatible. Grid lines should be very subtle (opacity 0.1). Use Volt Blue and Neon Green for data lines.
components.badges: Sharp edges, 1px border. No soft backgrounds. e.g., border border-[#00FF66] text-[#00FF66] bg-transparent.

testing.requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case, role-based.

backgrounds.description: Abstract grid pattern. Use with heavy black overlay (e.g. bg-[#0A0A0A]/95 or black gradient) to create a subtle tactical grid in the header or hero of the dashboard.

animations.hover: Hover state must be explicitly set (e.g. hover:bg-[#1A1A1A] hover:text-white). Transition properties must be specific.
animations.interactions: Micro-interactions on buttons and table rows. Entrance animations (staggered) for lists using Framer Motion.

specific_views.bot_activity: Top row, spanning full width using grid. Use large numbers (text-4xl or 5xl) for metrics like users and coupons. Pair with small trending up/down indicators in neon green.
specific_views.live_matches: Grid span 2 or 3. Use dense table. Show team names, odds, and a flashing 'Live' red indicator.
specific_views.generated_coupons: Vertical feed style (col-span-1 row-span-2). Cards detailing coupon odds, risk level (color coded: red/high, yellow/med, green/low).
specific_views.ai_analysis: Terminal/Retro look for logs. Dark black background, monospace font for logs, neon green text for successful events.
specific_views.bot_statistics: Main chart area (col-span-full md:col-span-2). Area or Line chart showing user growth or coupon success over time using Recharts.
